How It Works

Three steps.
One outcome.

No clinics. No consultations you didn't ask for. No commitment beyond your first order.

01
Take the Match Quiz

Three minutes. Your hair colour, texture, scalp tone, density and lifestyle — mapped to your exact specification. No sales call required.

02
Receive Your Piece

Plain packaging. No branding. Delivered to your door with a full installation guide — or handed directly to your partner stylist on day one.

03
Live Without Compromise

Gym. Pool. Wind. Humidity. Full intensity. Maintained monthly with your Maintenance Club delivery. Replaced on your schedule. That is the standard.
